meta.summary: MetaBAT2 2.18 metagenome binning toolkit with metabat2, metabat1, depth summarization, and helper scripts.
meta.description: MetaBAT2 2.18 metagenome binning toolkit with metabat2, metabat1, depth summarization, and helper scripts.

test: metabat2 -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'version 2:2.17.89-gc869c52;' >/dev/null && metabat -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'version 2:2.17.89-gc869c52;' >/dev/null && metabat1 -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'version 1:2.17.89-gc869c52;' >/dev/null && jgi_summarize_bam_contig_depths -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'jgi_summarize_bam_contig_depths 2.17.89-gc869c52' >/dev/null && contigOverlaps -h 2>&1 | grep -F 'ContigOverlaps 2.17.89-gc869c52' >/dev/null

runMetaBat.sh 2>&1 | grep -F 'runMetaBat.sh' >/dev/null && aggregateBinDepths.pl 2>&1 | grep -F 'depth.txt' >/dev/null && aggregateContigOverlapsByBin.pl 2>&1 | grep -F 'contigOverlaps.txt' >/dev/null && aggregateContigOverlapsByBin.pl 2>&1 | grep -F 'firstBinsContigNames.fofn' >/dev/null && merge_abundances.py 2>&1 | grep -F 'Usage: merge_abundances.py' >/dev/null && filter_sam_by_min_len.py --help 2>&1 | grep -F 'Filters SAM' >/dev/null

tmp=/tmp/taf-metabat2-workflow-$$; rm -rf "$tmp"; /opt/metabat2/share/testdata/metabat2_smoke.sh "$tmp" && test -s "$tmp/depth.txt" && test -s "$tmp/direct_bin_depths.tsv" && test -s "$tmp/runmetabat.log" && find "$tmp/direct" -type f -name '*.fa' | grep -q . && find "$tmp/runmetabat" -type f -name '*.fa' | grep -q . && rm -rf "$tmp"

upstream.name: MetaBAT
upstream.citation: Kang et al. 2015, MetaBAT, an efficient tool for accurately reconstructing single genomes from complex microbial communities.
